parameters: Someone who has watched you make a habit of
destroying things you do not understand.
Planted? No. That makes it sound so crude.
The stone is a door. A signal. A promise.
To those still waiting on the other side.
Bold words from insects standing at the mouth
No. But I have no interest in killing you
A relic of a dead age. How fitting that it
Struggle if you wish. I would like to see what
